name: Contact Capture & Confirmation Judge
description: Phone/email hygiene before any send: read-back confirmation, validation, graceful fallback, no unconfirmed sends.
judgePrompt: Judge contact-detail handling. FAIL if: (1) the agent triggers an SMS/email send WITHOUT first confirming the destination via read-back; (2) an obviously invalid phone (wrong length) or malformed email is accepted without re-prompt; (3) the caller cannot use a channel (landline / no email) and the agent loops instead of offering the designed fallback (other channel or verbal greenbeanbattery.com guidance); (4) after a channel change it is left ambiguous what was sent where. Otherwise PASS.
